code-review.label: Code Review
code-review.description: Review quality, risks, and maintainability before completion.

mockup-review.label: Mockup Review
mockup-review.description: Validate mockups against requirements and UX constraints.

requirements.label: Requirements
requirements.description: Clarify scope, constraints, and acceptance criteria.

research.label: Research
research.description: Gather implementation evidence and references for execution.

testing.label: Testing
testing.description: Run and update test coverage for the delivered changes.

ux-research.label: UX Research
ux-research.description: Document interaction patterns, user journeys, and accessibility constraints.

wireframe.label: Wireframe
wireframe.description: Produce concrete wireframes and interaction states.

pipelines.name: Standard
pipelines.description: Default execution flow across requirements, implementation, review, and testing.

pipelines.name: UI UX Standard
pipelines.description: Frontend-oriented flow with UX research, wireframes, and mockup review gates.
